builds_on.name: retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
builds_on.evidence: existing open-source deep search agents typically employ retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) techniques with predefined workflows

builds_on.name: online Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)
builds_on.evidence: we construct preference pairs for online DPO training

builds_on.name: large reasoning models (LRMs)
builds_on.evidence: we propose WebThinker, an autonomous deep research agent entirely powered by large reasoning models
